description: CompositionBlue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, sleeveless with a square neck, has blue and green panelling along the neck and armholes, and has split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed kurta from w!
